description_long: This chair features a modern design with a sturdy, curved wooden frame that forms both the armrests and the base, creating a continuous loop around the seat and backrest. The seat and backrest are generously padded and upholstered in a light gray fabric, offering comfort and a clean, contemporary look. The wooden frame has a natural finish, showcasing the wood grain and adding warmth to the overall aesthetic. The armrests are integrated into the frame, providing support and a seamless appearance. The backrest is slightly reclined for ergonomic support, while the seat is wide and flat, suitable for various body types. This chair would be well-suited for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or stylish outdoor patios under cover.
description: A modern chair with a curved wooden frame and light gray upholstered seat and backrest, featuring integrated armrests and a natural wood finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, padded seat and backrest with the wooden armrests curving outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the continuous wooden frame and the thickness of the seat and backrest padding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the curved wooden frame encircling the backrest and the seamless integration of the structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the ergonomic recline of the backrest and the smooth, rounded wooden base.
